brand.description_en: Bugatti Automobiles S.A.S. is a French high-performance luxury automobile manufacturer headquartered in Molsheim, Alsace. Founded by Ettore Bugatti in 1909, the modern era began with the Veyron in 2005. Known for producing the fastest and most expensive production cars in the world.
brand.description_zh: 布加迪是一家法国高性能豪华汽车制造商，总部位于阿尔萨斯地区的莫尔塞姆。由埃托雷·布加迪于1909年创立，现代布加迪以2005年推出的威龙开启新纪元。以生产世界上最快、最昂贵的量产车而闻名。

series.description_en: The EB110 marked Bugatti's return in 1991 after decades of dormancy. A technical tour de force featuring a quad-turbocharged 3.5L V12 producing 553 hp (GT) or 603 hp (SS), all-wheel drive, and a carbon fiber monocoque — revolutionary for its era.
series.description_zh: EB110标志着布加迪在沉寂数十年后于1991年的复出。这款技术杰作搭载四涡轮增压3.5L V12发动机（GT版553马力，SS版603马力），全时四驱，碳纤维单体壳——在那个年代极具革命性。

variants.description_en: The standard EB110 GT returned Bugatti to the supercar stage with a 553 hp quad-turbo V12 and revolutionary carbon fiber construction. Features a 6-speed manual gearbox and permanent AWD. Michael Schumacher owned one.
variants.description_zh: 标准版EB110 GT以553马力四涡轮V12和革命性碳纤维结构让布加迪重返超跑舞台。搭载6速手动变速箱和全时四驱。迈克尔·舒马赫曾拥有一台。

variants.description_en: The track-focused SS variant boosted power to 603 hp and cut weight to 1,430 kg using extensive carbon fiber. At 351 km/h it was the fastest production car of its era. Only 32 built.
variants.description_zh: 赛道取向的SS版将功率提升至603马力，通过大量使用碳纤维将重量削减至1,430公斤。以351 km/h的成绩成为当时最快的量产车。仅生产32台。

series.description_en: The Bugatti Veyron redefined what a production car could be. With a W16 engine displacing 8.0 litres and producing 1,001 hp, it became the first car to break 400 km/h in production form. Named after Pierre Veyron, winner of the 1939 Le Mans 24 Hours race.
series.description_zh: 布加迪威龙重新定义了量产车的边界。搭载8.0升W16发动机，输出1,001马力，成为首款量产车型突破400 km/h。以1939年勒芒24小时耐力赛冠军皮埃尔·威龙命名。

variants.description_en: The original Veyron 16.4 stunned the world with 1,001 hp and a 407 km/h top speed, making it the fastest production car ever at its launch. The 8.0L quad-turbo W16 engine required 10 radiators to cool. Production limited to 300 units over 10 years.
variants.description_zh: 初代威龙16.4以1,001马力和407 km/h极速震惊世界，成为当时史上最快量产车。8.0升四涡轮W16发动机需要10个散热器来冷却。10年间限量生产300台。

variants.description_en: The Super Sport pushed the W16 to 1,200 hp and set a Guinness World Record of 431.072 km/h in 2010, which stood as the fastest production car record for years. Larger turbos, revised aerodynamics, and only 30 units built.
variants.description_zh: 超级运动版将W16推至1,200马力，2010年以431.072 km/h创下吉尼斯世界纪录，多年蝉联最快量产车称号。采用更大涡轮和修订的空气动力学，仅生产30台。

variants.name_zh: 威龙 大运动敞篷版
variants.description_en: The open-top Vitesse combined Super Sport power (1,200 hp) with the Grand Sport roadster body. Set a world record for fastest open-top production car at 408.84 km/h. The most powerful open-air production car ever made at the time.
variants.description_zh: 敞篷版Vitesse将超级运动版的1,200马力与大运动敞篷车身结合。以408.84 km/h创下最快敞篷量产车世界纪录。是当时有史以来最强大的敞篷量产车。

series.description_en: The successor to the Veyron, named after Louis Chiron, Monaco-born racing driver. The Chiron pushed the W16 to 1,500 hp and introduced a new level of luxury alongside performance. Its successor the Tourbillon was announced in 2024.
series.description_zh: 威龙的继任者，以摩纳哥赛车手路易·奇龙命名。奇龙将W16推至1,500马力，在性能之外引入了全新水平的奢华。其继任者陀飞轮已于2024年发布。

variants.description_en: The Chiron debuted with 1,500 hp — 50% more than the original Veyron. Top speed electronically limited to 420 km/h (but capable of more). Features a completely new dual-clutch 7-speed gearbox and a redesigned W16 with sequential turbocharger activation. 500 units total.
variants.description_zh: 奇龙以1,500马力亮相——比原版威龙多50%。极速电子限制在420 km/h（实际能力更强）。配备全新双离合7速变速箱，重新设计的W16采用顺序涡轮激活技术。总产量500台。

variants.description_en: The handling-focused Chiron Sport reduced weight by 18 kg through carbon fiber wheels (world-first for a production car), revised suspension tuning, and dynamic torque vectoring. Aimed at drivers who prioritize agility over outright speed.
variants.description_zh: 操控取向的奇龙运动版通过碳纤维车轮（量产车世界首创）、修订的悬架调校和动态扭矩矢量减重18公斤。面向将敏捷性置于极速之上的驾驶者。

variants.description_en: Based on the test car that first broke 300 mph (490.484 km/h) in 2019 — the first production car to do so. Road-legal version with 1,578 hp and a longer tail for reduced drag. Limited to 30 units at $3.9M each.
variants.description_zh: 基于2019年首次突破300英里/小时（490.484 km/h）的测试车打造——史上首款突破该速度的量产车。公路合法版本，1,578马力，加长尾部以降低阻力。限量30台，每台售价390万美元。

variants.description_en: The Pur Sport is the driver's Chiron — 50 kg lighter, shorter gear ratios for faster acceleration, massive fixed rear wing, and revised suspension for circuit use. Top speed limited to 390 km/h to prioritize lateral performance.
variants.description_zh: 纯粹运动版是驾驶者的奇龙——减重50公斤，更短的变速箱齿比提升加速性能，巨大的固定式尾翼，针对赛道的修订悬架。极速限制在390 km/h以优先考虑横向性能。
